memoryArtifacts.headline: James Tomlinson - Ancestry of Larry Joe Hiatt
memoryArtifacts.description:
Born in 1801, in Fayette County, Kentucky; the son of William Tomlinson.

At the age of eleven, James moved with his family to Maury County, Tennessee, settling in the Culleoka area.

James married fi …

zh.Virginia, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州
zh.lifeSummary: 當Valentine Richard Allen於1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州時，他的父親Arthur Allen29歲，母親Alice Tucker22歲。他於大約1650年與Mary Jane Page在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特聖 比特也斯 帕里什結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1712年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州艾可奧派希亞享年82歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特普特尼斯 密爾。

zh-hans.Virginia, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valentine Richard Allen于1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州时，他的父亲Arthur Allen29岁，母亲Alice Tucker22岁。他于大约1650年与Mary Jane Page在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特聖 比特也斯 帕里什结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1712年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州艾可奧派希亞享年82岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特普特尼斯 密爾。

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Allenby
meanings: English: habitational name from Allonby (Cumberland). The placename is a post-Conquest compound of the French (Breton) personal name Alein (see Allen ) + Old Norse bȳ ‘village’, or the same word borrowed into Middle English.

variants.name: Allin
meanings: English (Devon): variant of   Allen  .
Swedish: variant of   Ahlin  .

variants.name: Alano
meanings: Italian (mainly Campania) and Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from the personal name Alano (see Allen ).

variants.name: Alan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Allen  . This is the usual form of the personal name in England and Scotland.

variants.name: Allan
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Allen  . This is the more common form of the name in Scotland and northern England. See also   McAllen  .

History: An early bearer of this surname in North America was William Allan, a British soldier who took his family to the newly founded city of Halifax, NS, Canada, in 1749. His son John (1746–1805) was a Revolutionary soldier who eventually (1783) founded the settlement of Allan's Island, Passamaquoddy Bay, ME.

variants.name: Allain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean-Paul, Adelard, Alban, Albenie, Alphonse, Andree, Cyrille, Donat, Emile, Euclide, Francois.

Breton and French: from the Old Breton personal name Alan (Old French Alain); see Allen . In France the personal name is spelled Alain, and this is also a less common variant of the surname (see Alain ).
English: variant of   Allen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Alen
meanings: English: variant of   Allen  .
Galician (Alén): habitational name from one of the many places called Alén in Galicia (Spain), from Galician alén ‘beyond’.
Flemish and Dutch: patronymic from   Ale  .

variants.name: Allis
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Alis, Alice (Old French Adeliz, Ahelis, Aalis, Aliz). Alice, together with its pet form Alison, was one of the most popular names in both England and Scotland from the 13th century until the end of the medieval period. The personal name is of ancient Germanic origin, brought to England from France by the Normans; it is a shortened form of ancient Germanic Adalheidis, which is composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + haid ‘‘rank, worth’’.

variants.name: Alleyne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Chantal, Julien, Marcell.

English: variant of   Allen  . This is an old-fashioned spelling, already established as a surname in England in Tudor times. Today this surname is found mainly in the West Indies, especially Barbados.

variants.name: Alling
meanings: English: either a variant of Allen , or a variant of Halling with loss of initial H-.
German: habitational name from either of two places called Alling, one in Bavaria and one in Austria.
Danish: habitational name from any of several places called Alling. The placename may be a derivative of al ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Valentine Richard Allen was born in 1630, in Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Arthur Allen, was 29 and his mother, Alice Tucker, was 22. He married Mary Jane Page about 1650, in St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 11 November 1712, in Occupacia, Essex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 82, and was buried in Putneys Mill, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valentine Richard Allen è nato il nel 1630 nel Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Arthur Allen, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice Tucker, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mary Jane Page circa 1650, nel St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1712, nel Occupacia, Essex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Putneys Mill, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Valentine Richard Allenが1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州で生まれた時，父Arthur Allenは29歳，母Alice Tuckerは22歳であった。約1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ニュー ケントスト. ペテル'ス パーイッシュでMary Jane Pageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1712年11月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州エセックスオククウプアシアで82歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ニュー ケントプウトニーズ ミルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Valentine Richard Allen(이)가 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arthur Allen(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Tucker(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트 스트. 피터'스 파리시에서 Mary Jane Page(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1712년 11월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 에세스 옥쿠업악이아에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트 풋니스 미에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valentine Richard Allen nasceu em 1630, em Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Arthur Allen, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tucker, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Jane Page aproximadamente 1650, em St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1712, em Occupacia, Essex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Putneys Mill, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valentine Richard Allen родился в 1630 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Arthur Allen было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Tucker, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Jane Page около 1650 г. в местности ст. питир'с пэриш, ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 11 ноября 1712 г. в местности оккупася, эссекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности путнис милл, ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Valentine Richard Allen nació en 1630, en Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Arthur Allen, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Tucker, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mary Jane Page aproximadamente 1650, en St. Peter's Parish, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1712, en Occupacia, Essex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Putneys Mill, New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America.
